item.title: Rise of high net worth art loans: Here's what to know
item.description: The business of lending money to the wealthy against their art collection is becoming a booming industry. CNBC's Robert Frank joins 'Squawk Box' with ...

item.title: The blue wave of tax hikes: Here's what to know
item.description: Washington may be the next state to see the wealthy flee. CNBC's Robert Frank joins 'Squawk Box' with the details.

item.title: Epstein files highlight how the wealthy borrow against art collections
item.description: Art loans are typically used by the wealthy to provide ready cash, leverage financial investments and avoid hefty tax bills.

item.title: Equinox chairman says 'health is the new luxury' as wellness spending soars
item.description: Harvey Spevak, Equinox's executive chairman, said demand for "Optimize" memberships highlights the "insatiable" demand by the wealthy for wellness off...

item.title: Inside Wealth: Equinox's Harvey Spevak on why health is the new luxury
item.description: CNBC Wealth Editor Robert Frank speaks exclusively with Equinox Executive Chairman Harvey Spevak about the global wellness market and why the wealthy ...
